title: Teleology (Purpose)
description: What is this for - intent, goals, purposes, functions

table-registry-purpose.purpose: Central registry determining which MoneyWorks entities are available via REST API
table-registry-purpose.how: Controllers register during initialization, populating available Map<string, TableController>
table-registry-purpose.why: Single source of truth for API availability, enables dynamic table discovery
table-registry-purpose.criticality: HIGH - unregistered controllers make entities inaccessible

loom-completion-workflow-purpose.purpose: Systematic story completion with validation, documentation, learning extraction, commit creation
loom-completion-workflow-purpose.why: Ensures thorough completion, captures learnings for institutional knowledge

us-002-primary-goal.goal: Implement complete Account entity with full-stack CRUD interface
subgoals: Canonical layer: Types, enums, fields, validators
Data layer: Repository with specialized queries + tests
API layer: Controller registered in TableRegistry
UI layer: List + detail routes, navigation

fix-us-001-mistake-intent.intent: Ensure US-002 doesn't repeat US-001's incomplete API layer mistake
manifestedAs: TableRegistry registration tracked as T-026 with CRITICAL importance
fix-us-001-mistake-intent.outcome: Success - Account immediately usable, unlike Product
